title: ee.migration.shard_fanout.v1
description: Structured audit event for per-workspace shard fan-out migration planning, apply, rollback, and verification.

workspace_id.description: Deterministic workspace ID whose rows are planned for, copied to, verified in, or rolled back from this shard.

workspace_path.description: Redaction-safe workspace path or null when the event is emitted from catalog-only recovery.

shard_id.description: Stable shard identifier. For v1 this is expected to derive from workspace_id.

catalog_path.description: Catalog database path used by this migration event.

source_db_path.description: Legacy source ee.db path, when known.

target_db_path.description: Target shard path for this workspace, when known.

preserved_source_path.description: No-delete preserved source database path, for example .pre-shard-fanout.db.

source_db_hash.description: Hash of the source database or null for phases that run before source hashing is possible.

target_db_hash.description: Hash of the target shard database or null for dry-run phases that do not materialize a target.

row_counts.description: Per-table row counts observed or planned for this workspace shard.

rollback_available.description: True when the event proves a preserved source DB or verified backup is available for rollback.

recovery.description: Structured recovery actions in the same spirit as error.details.recovery[].

message.description: Short diagnostic message for human logs. Machine decisions must use structured fields.
